Beginner Guide

Start from zero and quickly master your journey on Novus

Home›Beginner Guide

7 Steps to Get Started

Follow these steps to quickly integrate into the world of RF ONLINE NEXT

1

Choose Your Race

First, choose your race faction: Bellato, Accretia, or Cora. Each race has unique visual styles and ultimate weapons. Beginners are recommended to choose Bellato — easy to play and in high team demand.

2

Complete the Tutorial

The game provides a complete beginner tutorial — make sure to finish it thoroughly. It teaches basic controls, Bio Suit switching, flight systems, and combat techniques. You'll receive your first basic equipment and Bio Suit upon completion.

3

Choose Your First Bio Suit

Beginners are recommended to prioritize Punisher (ranged DPS, easy to play) or Cipher (AoE mage, efficient farming). You can freely switch via the Bio Suit system later without re-leveling.

4

Prioritize Main Quests

Following main quests is the fastest way to level up. Main quests not only provide massive XP but also unlock core systems including flight, ultimate weapons, and Mine Wars.

5

Join an Active Guild

Joining an active guild early on is crucial. Guilds provide XP bonuses, resource assistance, and are prerequisites for participating in Mine Wars. Active guilds also help you quickly integrate into the game community.

6

Master Bio Suit Switching

The Bio Suit system is the game's core feature. You can switch Bio Suits anytime during combat based on the situation, with equipment and skill progression retained. Master at least 2-3 Bio Suits to handle different combat scenarios.

7

Join Mine Wars

Join Mine Wars as soon as you meet the level requirement. This is the core way to obtain rare resources and currency. Even with insufficient combat power, you can contribute through support roles (like Informer or Technician) and earn rewards.

Race Comparison

DimensionBellatoAccretiaCora
Difficulty⭐⭐ Easy⭐⭐⭐ Medium⭐⭐⭐ Medium

Mobility⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Ultimate WeaponMAU ArmorLauncherAnimus
Team RoleAll-RounderFrontline TankHealer/DPS
Best ForBeginners/All-RoundTank/RangedMage/Support

Essential Beginner Tips

Resource Management

Gold and enhancement materials are precious early on — don't waste them on low-level gear. Focus resources on purple-quality or higher equipment from main quests, or prioritize enhancing Bio Suit core skills.

Common Mistakes

Don't only train one Bio Suit! Although switching retains growth, each Bio Suit's skill levels need separate improvement. We recommend maining 2 Bio Suits with 1 backup.

Farming Advice

Don't rush into farming as a beginner — first reach mid-level and familiarize yourself with the economy. Participating in Mine Wars and daily dungeons provides stable resource income. See the Farming Guide for details.

  1. Always claim daily login rewards — cumulative login rewards are very generous
  2. Prioritize daily and weekly quests — they are the main source of XP
  3. Practice aerial combat immediately after unlocking the flight system — it's a key PVP advantage
  4. The Exchange shop has great value transitional gear — don't rely solely on drops
  5. Use auto-battle for daily dungeons, but always play manually for PVP and Mine Wars
  6. Follow the official event calendar — limited events often provide rare rewards and double XP
  7. Join Discord or community groups for first-hand guides and team-forming information
